title: Resolve curvature-accounting condition: C2: A_curv scalar residue neutrality
description: Sector: A_curv residue. Allowed condition: C_curv = 0 outside, or curvature residue is strictly diagnostic/non-metric. Forbidden condition: phi_curv = C_curv/r with C_curv != 0 treated as ordinary exterior scalar charge. Consequence: curvature diagnostics must not leave a hidden scalar mass tail..
